channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. — 53 replies — 162.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job.

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:16 UTC

OP

I've been a NEET for a long time and I'm finally trying to get a job. I'm not young, 40 next year, and don't have a job history or references. High school graduate.
How fucked am I?

Early replies (first 3)

62449979
I live in California, too.

62449982
What did you do for the last 23 years? Hard to help without more context. Do you have skills?

62449989
>>62449982
Depression and NEET means not in education employment or training.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450478
>>62450440
It's 4 in the morning, fuckface.

62450482
Just make up a story you worked for your parents business or something the last 20 years and now they retired and sold it and you need a job. Don’t walk into McDicks and tell them you haven’t done shit in 20 years.

62450490
>>62450437
You are entitled manchild. You got your answers. Entry level jobs or army. Those are your only options beside killing yourself faggot. That is what your get for over 20 years of parasiting on your parents lazy nigger

62450558
>>62449961
Any job that requires an application like your pic you are pretty fucked unless you can find a way to lie on it, otherwise seek jobs without an application, plenty of ads on Craigslist for stuff like construction work or simple labour jobs. For the most part you just call the listings and as long as you sound normal, motivated and willing to work asap, they will have you on for a test day. They may ask to meet on site 1st for a quick in person interview before hiring but most of the time they just do the phone interview, they may ask question about experience, you will have to lie and say you’ve done general labour work in the past and can complete any non skilled labour no problem. Once you get your test day then you just have to not be the slowest guy on the job site and you will get the job

62450695
So, none of you know what you're talking about? I've got one guy crying bitch tears because he realized he wasted years of his life working minimum wage for nothing and another guy actually recommending Craigslist odd jobs.
Holy Christ on high, we're all screwed but at least I'm not as screwed as you!

62450832
There is a reason having no job history at 40 limits you to options like the military and it isn't because of the joos or evil corporations. It is because having no job history at 40 speaks very clearly about an aspect of your character highly relevant to a potential employer: you are lazy, unfocused, and irresponsible. And if you don't already know that about yourself, you are also severely lacking in self-awareness. The military will take you because they can essentially beat you into usable shape. Who else will want you? Nobody wants to hire a problem.

62450851
>>62450695
>11pbtid lamenting how screwed he is
>"at least I'm not as screwed as you!"

62450858
>>62450832

Only desperate places like warehouses and factories. If you pick the right one it isn't the worst career path, show up to work every day and do a decent job and they insta promote you to manager within a year.

62450864
Seriously OP. An entry level job is your only option at this point. You're not going to get hired for anything higher unless you lie on your application, and I don't think you could even do that right

62450874
>>62449961
Get some volunteer or part time work tangental to what you want to do so you can spin it on a resume. Look for any certifications that aren’t scams in what you want to do or any self study for getting the skillset or training. Work in unskilled labor in the meantime. You are in a good spot for a lot of unskilled labor if you’re sober, no criminal record and healthy. Grind toward a skillset in the meantime

62450882
>>62450832
Don’t listen to doomer zogs. A 40 year old who can show up to a job sober and consistent is worlds ahead of much of the younger generation

62451026
>>62450858
This is true - if you get an entry level job, show up reliably, do decent work, and don't be an asshole, you will be promoted quickly. But the op has done exactly nothing for twenty adult years. Do you think he is going to suddenly start hauling his ass out of bed every morning at 7 sharp, get his grooming shit together enough to be presentable, get to work, and take orders from younger people eight hours a day for a year? Not going to happen. And employers know it. A kid fresh out of High School at least MIGHT be somewhat conscientious. OP's track record speaks loud and clear. Sure, he can lie on his app and make up some shit to get a job, but the truth of his character will out. He doesn't need a job, he needs a transformation.

62451041
>>62451026

No, in all probability making it to 40 without ever having worked means you're probably incredibly mindbroken and cursed. Just being optimistic lol

62451063
>>62449961
You're pretty much fucked permanently, anon. But welcome the challenge. Make some YouTube videos about your quest. Your life. Some faggots will at least give you some patreon donations, provided your channel picks up

62451093
>>62450832
>it isn't because of the joos

Just can't help it, can you

62451099
>>62450437
What do you want? To be spoonfed?
>>62450098
You sound like the troll here. "Magic" "stop posting" lmao
NEETing is the ultimate troll but you troll yourself by turning yourself into a life long loser.
>>62450003
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PirmJJmTNjw
This guy did it and he's older than you. Why can't you?
You have 20 years left before you become totally useless in society and won't want to work, realistically much less than that.

62451161
>>62451093
>jews want 40 year old losers to work
>jews spend time online giving sage advice to 40 year old losers online
I don't even think he's jewish. Anon may be a leftfag but his advice is pristine. Get some fucking discipline and transform yourself.

62451241
>>62449961
>How fucked am I?
Approx. 100%. Nobody will ever want to hire you with a 20+ years gap in your resume. I know because i'm just like you, just 2 years younger. But at least i used my free time to invest and run side gigs so i managed to get myself a $200k cushion for when my parents croaks. It's not perfect but it will leave me some time to figure things out, because i'll always be on my own, nobody will ever hire me, and they'd be right, i'd do an absolutely atrocious wagie.

The question is : why now? Did your parents die and didn't leave anything behind for you to survive on?
You have to put yourself in the employers' shoes : would you hire yourself if you were the boss? If you are honest the answer will be no. So you'll have to open your own business if you want to survive. And you can do quite well outside of the wagecuckery loop. Personally i'm insanely lazy which is why i'm a poorfag, but per hour i earn much more than the average wagie.
The only issue is you'll need a little bit of capital to get started, how much do you currently have in savings?

62451269
You keep acting like I did something wrong. I did all the hoop jumps I was supposed when I was younger. Nobody wanted to hire me then. I gave up for a while, the depression or whatever hit. But that wasn't my fault, I needed help but all I got was abuse. Just like this thread.

62451296
>>62451269
Yeah, life is a bitch, but you are supposed to have figured this out in your 20s, not at 40. Still, not everything is lost, but you have to change your mentality. I guess you watched a shitload of animus in your free time. Do the MCs keep whining and bitching? Or do they keep struggling against all odds until they achieve their goal? You need to have your typical shonen MC mentality from now on anon.

62451331
>>62451296
I guess it doesn't really matter. I have to turn my life around somehow anyway.
But the raw hatred pouring out at me from this thread, my God.

62451339
you have two options, one is to find a way to move to a third world (classical sense, not total shithole with no food) country that doesn't already have a tourist scene and teach English for about half of what a licensed professional would earn. the other is to day trade and hopefully snowball that money into something usable

62451345
>>62451269
How did you spend a typical day for the past 15 years? Did you develop any unique skills or creative hobbies that could be leveraged into potential employment?

62451382
>>62450851
OP is right

62451403
>>62451345
Mostly videogames and books. After my Internet got cut off by my mother after an argument I just kept to my room a awhile and apparently fell into a deep depression. My early attempts to get a job flopped for the most part and since I'm miles away from town with no car or driver's license that was kinda it. There's no jobs in the middle of the woods at the end of a freeway.
And then Dad got sick so I had to help Mom take care of him until he died, and now my mother is nearly as bad off as my dad was so we need either a live-in nurse or to put her in a nurse home, because I can't take care of her by myself.

62451415
>>62451331
People hold on dearly to doing what is considered the normal path in the world is. They fight it like life or death because it is what their entire psyche grasps onto for safety. They get comforted by putting down anyone who doesn’t align to that path. They rebel at the concept a deadbeat 40 year old could still work and get lucky enough to get ahead of them, or an alcoholic who fails out of high school could sober up and start a wildly successful business. The concepts of grace and redemption are against their worldview that they alone steered their life how it “should” be

62451426
>>62449961
> 40 next year, and don't have a job history or references. High school graduate.
How fucked am I?

I'm a neet who occasionally gets bored and decide to work regular jobs.

I come into the interview drunk and my resume is 100% made up because I tend to quit these jobs after a few weeks.

Literally just lie and make shit up that lines up with where you are trying to get hired.

62451507
>>62451403
Damn that sucks, but like I said earlier now that you have nothing it's a great time to leave your country and to travel, get a backpack and start trekking

62451523
>>62451041
Whoever facilitated OP's deadly inertia really fucked him over.

62451539
>>62451523
There are people who have worked all their lives who still have nothing lmao, maybe you're one of them

item.title: Index funds are dead — 40 replies — 160.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Index funds are dead

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:27 UTC

OP

Something like 70% of the American public has their money in the stock market.

Index fund investors (“Bogleheads bro!”) want you to believe that they’re all going to be rich because they put $500 a month into the market. This would essentially mean every single American would become rich just by DCAing into the US stock market.

Index investing is dead. The ONLY reason it worked in the past is because like 5% of Americans owned stocks. The ones that got in first benefited from everyone else piling in, exactly like Bitcoin.

Look at Bitcoin, all the Bitcoin retards made the same mistake of telling people it’ll just go up and up forever, now we’ve plateaued for the last 5 years and the Bitcoin trade is dead.

The only winners going forward will be good active investors. You’ve been warned.

Early replies (first 3)

62448308
It's all going to crash in the next 5 years, and economic pain will be unlike anything we've ever felt. So enjoy your gay stocks you fucking wealthsimple zoomer nigger.

62448320
>>62448306
It's so over for America saar! India superpower by 2030!

62448334
>>62448306
You're forgetting that since the 1970s and the birth of the Internet we've seen basically all major corporations become multi-national entities, access to the American markets overseas increasing, sovereign wealth funds worth trillions of dollars coming up with holding timelines that basically go to infinity since they're not constrained to the lifespan of a single person, etc.
The days of the USA markets being constrained to just America is fucking over. That's why the Buffett Indicator is such a worthless metric now. The USA has basically conquered the globe in terms of stocks, sure you'll get some thirdies teeth gnashing over this and crying about BRICS but fundamentally the Boglechads are still right and are still early.
>B-BUT THAT MEANS AMERICANS WITH STOCKS ARE GOING TO BE WEALTHY
Yeah, no shit. We're the best country on earth, of course we're wealthy.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62448444
North afrimerican glamour is diminishing, starcucks just ain't that cool anymore

62448451
>>62448407
I'll accept your concession :)

62448604
Fixed mortgages are the reason these hyperinflation dollar is worthless scenarios are such a pipe dream.

62448645
Cool story bro, still buying $250/week though

62448657
>>62448306
>Index fund investors (“Bogleheads bro!”) want you to believe that they’re all going to be rich because they put $500 a month into the market.

We can wiggle with the definition of rich but if you start young yes you'll have millions of dollars by retirement. If you consider people who are actually making decent money and able to put away $1000, $5000, $10k a month it's undeniable.

>This would essentially mean every single American would become rich just by DCAing into the US stock market.

Yes.

>Index investing is dead.

Why is it dead?

>now we’ve plateaued for the last 5 years and the Bitcoin trade is dead.

You sound like a pretty tarded zoomer. If a market ever drops to a 5 year low then it's over? What the fuck is a recession or depression to you?

62448707
>>62448306
>the tulip market failed this proves that index funds are dead
So how's the weather in Karachi, Mahboub?

62448715
Quitting my job was a mistake. It wasn't a good job, but getting yourself hyped up to apply for and get a new job and commute to work is a pain in the ass. It's easier to stick with routine. If I joined the military in 2017 after working at the ice cream shop due to my worthless degree I could have slipped into some meme clearance job working with Servicenow or something for the last 3 years once they stopped caring about vaccines. In 2022 and 2023 I could have just been on unemployment, severance pay, going back to school with military help.

62448739
>>62448715
For a loser the military is a great opportunity to acquire wealth

62448751
>>62448739
Kelly's Heroes was fictional though and I'm tired of pretending it wasn't.

62448752
>>62448339
>taking market risk just to break even

He does it for free!

62449026
>>62448339
It's 7% a year in the future but 5% a year in reality adjusted for inflation

62449374
>>62448308
>t. Doomer from 5 years ago

62449868
So whats better?

62449870
After inflation and taxes, you get like 1-2% from index funds

Its fucking retarded

62449878
>>62448306
>The only winners going forward will be good active investors.

So basically just trading firms with proprietary digital superintelligence who farm everyone else for exit liquidity.

Is it possible, is it just possible, that the average person is screwed, just like they were for 99.999999% of history?

62449882
>>62448306
I was actively stock picking for the past year and I did beat the market but I’m too lazy to constantly be researching and listening to my cabal of financial pundits everyday.

I’m just gonna DCA my paycheck into VOO and a bit of VXUS and let it be. I’m not willing to work harder or hustle. So if this doesn’t work that’s too bad Sonny

62449891
the only way to beat the market is buying bitcoin or leveraged bitcoin at the bottom, the rest is gambling

62449899
>>62449870
>taxes

Found the dumb incel crybaby who hasn't read the tax code

62450040
>>62448306
>70% of Americans have money in index funds
>index funds are dead
"No one goes there anymore, it's too crowded"

62450136
The real reason index funds are dying is because bailing out and enshrining the monopolies of the top companies in every index is no longer and will no longer be a popular investment strategy when Israel wields trump over Iran having some uranium and there won't be an occupy wall Street idpol smokescreen to bail out the AI bubble popping that is only what it is because of east Asian ram fan plants being extremely mafioso with how they deal to the mag7 who only survive by perpetuating the myth that the minimum wage rising is good for the economy and not a root cause of evaporating the middle class with inflation. If you get laid off because of ai you are not investing in an AI bubble boondoggle index fund that is 20%+ Nvidia, msft, AAPL, goog, meta, pltr, intc etc.... you are investing bear

62450142
I'm gonna get so fucking rich from my investments, I'm so lucky money wise.

62450144
>>62450142
You eatin good soon bro, donchu worry bout it :)

62450343
>>62448334
Holy shit that literal 30 year crab market from 1970 to 2000.

That couldn't happen again... right bros..?

The whole "10% average return per year over the last 100 years" thing wasn't calculated by taking into account the massive asset bubble of the last 5 years... was it bros...?

62450420
>>62448366
shut the fuck up you dumb pajeet

62450553
>>62450343
You didn't actually read the caption of the chart did you, speed-reader-kun?

62450666
>>62448334
> We're the best country on earth, of course we're wealthy.

62450677
>>62448752
literally anything else carries exponentially higher risk.

>>62449026
if you believe the government figure for inflation you really are the best goy

62450682
>>62449870
LTCG ensures if you only pull out 120k a year (in profit for married couples only) you'll pay no federal tax.

62450894
>>62450677
I don't

62451585
>>62448715
>It wasn't a good job, but getting yourself hyped up to apply for and get a new job and commute to work is a pain in the ass.

Very relatable, anon. I am 36 and have come to this conclusion as well. I am content to stay put at a place that is tolerable, even if I could make more somewhere else. Can't handle the stress anymore. Done with moving, commuting, and the interview process if I have anything to say about it. (Tradie who took a paycut for a low stress maintenance gig vs high paying construction money.)

item.title: Saylor sold 3,588 BTC — 36 replies — 144.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Saylor sold 3,588 BTC

Open thread • Replies: 36 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:29 UTC

OP

Saylor sold 3,588 BTC

Early replies (first 3)

62450542
such a comedy

buy high, sell low

mutts are cuckolds, france would conquer them in two weeks

62450550
>>62450537
Where Michael? Where?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450610
>>62450582
Nigga brings volatility at least.

62450630
>-1.6%
meh, could be worse. i think the 32 coins really did innoculate the market

62450638
>buy high sell low

A true /biz/tard

62450651
Shady Saylor, shady tether, shady creator, shady whales…everything about epstein pedo coin smells rotten

62450704
>>62450537
Kek
Buy high sell low
>over a two-week period, the average price he sold was $60,196.73.

62450749
>H-Here's why it's actually GOOD thing that Saylor is selling, Chud!
Imagine actually trusting Saylor somehow who spent literal decades bagholding after the dot com crash?

62451001
>V activated
we're so back

62451003
They're making the point that their BTC can be sold, and it can be sold without causing a death spiral, and they will sell if their debt and credit obligations requires this.

Notice how the market response was already much weaker this time.

I don't particularly like this sale, but you bullshitters made him do it by pretending all BTC bought from STRC proceeds is essentially lost because he could never possibly sell any of it.

62451011
Just $1 billion left to sell

62451013
>>62451003
The point is well made even though it does make them look retarded for buying high and selling low. If you are going to be 'rebalancing' then have a trading strategy already.

62451019
>>62451003
>and it can be sold without announcing that it was sold until after a three day trading weekend with low enough liquidity that bits can wash trade the price up then dump on retards the following Monday

62451036
>>62451001
>babby's first dead cat bounce

62451039
>>62451003
>buy at 120K
>sell at 60K

see guys, the company is doing the needful

62451042
>>62450537
Honestly impressed how well the market absorbed this. Bullish as fuck. Death spiral believers on suicide watch

62451044
All it takes is Strategy bot buying for the bottom to drop out.
Actively selling is death.
Not sure why people still thing your average retard and third worlder is propping up the market at this level.

62451049
>>62451042
>this is fine

62451053
>>62451039
His average acquisition price is $63k, no biggie

62451081
>>62451053
fuck off saylor

62451088
>>62450537
Paper handed bitch

62451132
>>62451039
Who cares whether they sell a tiny amount at a loss?
Your type will also celebrate unrealized losses, then disappear when the company will inevitably sit on unrealized gains again some time.
These metrics are meaningless in a treasury like this with no liquidation price, and which is massively over-collateralized. You only want to distract with your useless garbage.
>>62451081
You piece of shit started out claiming he bought at $120k, the other guy is at least closer. Per FIFO accounting we could also look at his oldest coins purchased in 2020 around $10k, in which case he just made a 500% profit. That's another useless distraction in your style.

62451164
>>62450537
DO NOT REDEEM SAAR

62451185
>>62451132
oh man you seem emotionally invested

enjoy holding the bags i guess

62451188
>>62451132
A 500% profit, well after 50% inflation more like 300%. That's why we use average, and that is 75k. Now factor in inflation and we are at 85k at the very least. Still quite a loss to sell at 60k.

62451234
>>62451185
You are useful in the sense that a crowd of your kind dominated the price action in the past few weeks, so even a very superficial reality check showed that Strategy was on sale, and you contributed to that discount.
I did load up those past two weeks, yes. Now that I'm done, I'm getting a little tired with these rumors, half-truths and other parroted garbage because I've read enough of it. I don't think of myself as particularly emotional, you can tell yourself that if it makes you feel better.

62451251
>>62450537
saylorcoin is FUCKED till this cuck is out

62451267
>>62450537
>unlimited dividends forever

62451294
>>62450537
He sold? Pump it

62451302
>>62451234
To the chair you go, cuck!

62451550
>>62451036
>>babby's first dead cat bounce
HAHAHA

62451591
saylor bought every top and now he is going to sell every bottom?

item.title: Extra Cash Besides a JOB — 23 replies — 92.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Extra Cash Besides a JOB

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:33 UTC

OP

Getting the obvious out of the way, everyone on this board is employed or in massive leveraged debt
That aside, what are you tried and true, consistent, easily accessible ways to make money on the side. Whether it's 50 bucks a week or 500 I don't care, just share some examples and provide actual explanations / results of the side gig whenever possible.
We are all on the same money making team bros let's help each other out

Early replies (first 3)

62446864
>>62446849
I fuck around on oil futures. Make like $25/day on average. It's time consuming but I do it during downtime at the office so why not.

62446865
Start a business and work at it 3 years you will be millionaire

62446869
>>62446865
what part of side or extra do you not understand dumb retarded faggot

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62446903
>>62446869
he's right though
most side-gigs are just bad businesses

if you get a successful side-gig you're running a good business.

anyways my side gig was crime scene cleanup, hazardous waste cleanup, and office cleaning. I made millions doing it and now it's my main business.

62446919
>>62446869
You are missing the part where stop crying on incel threads and start a business

62446925
Donate plasma, bonus it filters out microplastics; downside it takes two fucking hours.

62446939
i started a massage business and i only take clients if they sound hot...so far ive been able to make a good call 51% of the time every time.

62446991
>>62446903
See now im imagining dave ramsey telling people to buy a power washer and clean up crime scenes
anyway why is a multimillionaire on 4chan cmon

62446993
>>62446991
To show you losers the way. What you think millionaires don't shit!

62446997
>>62446991
in my generation millionaire isn't anything special. The median net of people my age is almost half a million, meaning at least a third of us are millionaires. Mostly because we bought houses way back in the late 1900's

anyways crime scene cleanup is pretty specialized. It's not regular work for most people because there just aren't that many murders and suicides. But it pays hundreds of dollars per hour so it's worth doing if you can.

62447037
Do you have any of those stores that buy and sell returned Amazon goods near you? Go on a restock day with a barcode scanner app handy and pick up any fancy electronics. It's pretty easy to find 50$+ things like headphones, watches, and more niche devices to resell on marketplace, eBay, etc.

62447512
>>62446849
unironically buy pokemon sealed products and sell in 1-2 years for 3-5x

62447559
>>62447512
Pist a picture of the ones you bought for this opportunity

62447924
anyone know of good AI strats

62449474
Bump

62449570
>>62446991

62449661
>>62447924
Lots. Finding the energy to do it after doing similar shit all day at a full time job is a different story.

Thinking about just running a POD node on my 5090 to rent out inference, but no idea what the returns on it would be, just know that POD's been climbing.

62450354
>>62449661
Yeah that’s what I’ve experienced I’ve made some money but it takes too much active work

62450987
Bumping

62451012
>>62446849
Making/selling crack, pimping, prostituting yourself, re-selling underpriced stuff you find at garage sales.

62451059
>>62451012
I think there is definitely a scale to the legality of your suggestions

62451064
>It's another episode of "I want money but don't want to work for it; please give me a cheat code"

62451605
>>62446849
rent out a spare bedroom in your house.
make sure it goes to a white person and do a little screening before hand and you should be safe.

item.title: Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escor… — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escor…

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:24 UTC

OP

Now that I've made it I'm wondering if it's worth dumping $6,000 on having a foursome with 3 high class STD-tested escorts.

Surely there's other rich anons here that have played out that fantasy? How was it? Anything you'd do differently if you had to do it again?

This is financial advice since although I won't miss that amount of money on a once-in-a-lifetime night I still want to get my money's worth.

Early replies (first 3)

62450611
Nigga thinks he's in a porn video lmao

62450618
>>62450597
Do you live in brazil or something? Three "high class" escorts in the US would rape you for 4k a piece

62450623
>>62450611
Yeah pretty much lol but keep in mind I'm 40 so I've had my time to think about what it is I really want in life before my time is up and this is one of those. Like, I know it's not going to be like in a porn video I'm not naive but I'm hoping to at least experience some of the acts only possible with three other women.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450626
>>62450618
Not Brazil but also not US. Yeah, I checked and in the US it's quite a bit more expensive but I think pretty much everything is more expensive in the US right now for obvious reasons lol.

62450640
>>62450626
Go ahead bro but honestly you'd have more fun just fucking their holes all night one by one instead of having some awkward foresome where you coom in 15 minutes then sit there with 3 coke addicted whores sitting in your place making small talk

62450814
>>62450640
>where you coom in 15 minutes
Don't worry I have my pharma game down so I'm sure that won't be the case. Besides I'm fine with watching for a while at any rate.

62450815
>>62450597
net worth?

62450816
>>62450640
Also I've done enough "one-by-one" in my life that I'm specifically not interested in that. The fantasy is more than one but might as well go big hence three more than one.

62450820
>>62450815
Mid 7

62450825
the std test will be forged

enjoy hiv, hsv and monkey..pox

62450830
>>62450597
Two women is already conspicuous consumption. Three is egregious. I've has threesomes with two women and it just turns into more work for you, not a joke. Women don't work to please men. >>62450597

62450852
>>62450825
>the std test will be forged
Hope not but is that really a popular thing they do especially if they're asking for so much? A test is like $50 here.

>>62450830
>and it just turns into more work for you
I'm ok with that. In fact I'm hoping for that. Was an amateur athlete in my youth and have kept up my physical fitness. Even now in 1-on-1 most women can't keep up. But enough bragging. Duly noted. Genuinely interested to hear other anons experiences as well.

One thing I'm worried about is if the women aren't interested... Since I'll be paying them what if they're just like dead fish or worse...

62450955
>paying woman to pretend to enjoy having sex with you
>paying three woman to pretend to enjoy having sex with you at the same time
they're all going to be dry as fuck

62451014
>>62450597
I've had a couple of threesomes with high end 10/10s and it's generally not worth it beyond doing it once just to have tried it. It's fucking exhausting and you can only cum a couple of times anyway

62451329
>>62450955
Yeah not gonna lie that would suck... Hate having to re-lube.

>>62451014
>it's generally not worth it
>It's fucking exhausting
Could you elaborate? Genuinely interested in your experience.

62451420
>>62450597
Two is already a lot to manage. Maybe start out with a threesome? If you can handle that go to four
Running out of stamina on three is a real risk even on drugs, I imagine it'd be very disappointing

62451458
>>62450852
Look man, it's your money. I just don't want you to come into it with high expectations and then it falls short. I'm glad I got it out of my system, and I don't regret it, but if I was offered one today if be on the fence. Maybe that's just what being past 30 feels like.

62451484
>>62451458
>I just don't want you to come into it with high expectations and then it falls short.
Thanks. I appreciate it. Truly. I'm just relating my history expectations as well. Did you go through an agency or independent? I'm planning on independent because then I figure they should at least have the experience to know how to actually behave like they're interested and whatnot.

62451490
>>62451420
>Maybe start out with a threesome?
It's a one-and-done for me so I'd rather just go all-out and like I said before I'm already sure I'm physically capable.

62451497
>>62451458
>Maybe that's just what being past 30 feels like.
Off-topic but there was a period of about a year where I didn't work out too much and lost physical fitness I'll never get back. But in your case I'm sure if you run and hit the gym you'll feel much MUCH younger again. I still mog the vast majority of people in their 20s fitness-wise and like I said I just turned 40.

62451571
>>62451329
you should never have to lube for sex anon..

item.title: VOO and Chill — 187 replies — 80.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 187 • Updated: 2026-07-06 14:16 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

62431374
VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses, Michelle Louie & Aurélie Denis. So with your 0.03% management fee you're essentially paying for those do-nothing "day in the life of a portfolio manager" videos for daughters of elite sociopaths.

62431402
>>62431374
A small price to pay for a low expense ratio

62431920
>>62431131
Anyone trying to beat VOO over decades.

62431922
>>62431920
Feel like VUG has consistently beaten VOO though

62431971
>>62431922
Contrarian.
I own VUG and don't own VOO tho :)

62432023
>>62431920
fair enough
thoughts on a younger person doing QQQM?

62434054
Anyone have thoughts or realized returns and experiences on VOO + satellite
accounts instead of just VOO

62435372
Was gonna try to go into this DRAM dip but decided to just do more VOO
But idk a higher return ETF still sounds promising and like a no brainer whether it’s SOXX or QQQM but QQQ has so much crossover with VOO it’s just redundant and only good for growth seasons
I guess this is why VOO and Chill exists to just stop thinking

62436303
>>62431920
What about QQQ though

62436357
i boughted my daily VOO
i'll keep dealing the real world like a good goyim in the mean time.

62436478
>>62436357
huzzah brother

62436499
>>62400493
Where my VGT bros at?

62436507
>>62400636
>Yes and I'm sure that used car and maybe a holiday you can buy with it when you're 65 from cashing out all your investments will be great.....
You say this as if the average /biz/ shitcoin gambler is performing better than VOO which is definitely not the case.

62436510
>>62428031
Your IQ is so actually low. Holy shit.

62436538
>>62436510
Do you think DRAM has value, honest question, and for how long - if so, what dip should one wait for
>>62436499
VGT and QQQ are only doing better thanks to tech having such strong performances for years now, correct?
VOO seems safe since you don't know the future, but on the other hand, thinking the future of the market for the next decades wont always be tech focused seems so short sighted it's silly.....maybe I should start DCA into VGT?

62436562
>>62400493
>VOO
it's EVOO for me lads

62438775
Yep bros
Bought some more VOO and am waiting on my DRAM position to go green so I can sell and not have to deal with thematic ETFs no high expense ratios ever again
Simple as

62440169
>>62431374
>VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses
VOO is passively managed. These 2 girls are not like Kathy Wood picking stocks.

62442752
>>62431374
They could boil alive eat grannies alive for all I care as long as they get the money going, what kind of faggot ass train of thought is this. They could become billionaires and I would not give a shit as long as it keeps compounding. "The people making me rich are foids so it makes me icky" is unironically the foidest take I have ever read.
>>62430902
A year ago I started investing for the first time in my life (I'm in my mid 20s) and thought I was very smart and I would just outperform the market 1% profit at a time. After a whole year I only managed to get a net benefit of a 3% after wasting many hours and carrying heavy bags. I learnt my lesson. VOO and chill.

62442988
>>62442752
>They could become billionaires and I would not give a shit as long as it keeps compounding.

The portfolio managers of VOO have 0 control over whether VOO compounds or not. VOO is simply an ETF that tracks the S&P 500. Their only job is to make sure VOO follows the S&P 500. Once the fund is set up, there really is not much for them to do. I guess if they haven't automated removing and adding companies to the composition of VOO, then they do that.

62444521
Let’s all say thank you to Jack Bogle

62444531
>>62400515
and yet boomers hold 90% of the wealth and growing...

62445651
>>62421799
>5+ yr 60% drawdown event happens
>buy cheaper voo

62446571
>>62444521
thanks chad bogle

62447653
>>62445651
Kek it really is that simple

62450991
>>62446571
Thanks Chad Bogle!

OP

https://x.com/Basedgoymemes/status/2073860759269077199

Early replies (first 3)

62449396
based

62449400
I wouldn't call jeets 'people'

62449441
Fuck this racist, post the person who started to do this was some white bitch, she did it for 12 years

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449539
>>62449441
Saaaaars

62449616
These are the niggas trying to shill you GRRR stock in /smg

62449623
>>62449539
Will white incels ever fight back or do they like the humiliation of giving away their country?

62449626
>>62449388
I'll post the same reply that I posted in your other thread on the exact same topic:
>>>/pol/538424408
>The sad thing is that a lot of people have done this, not just the poos. It's almost routine to see someone bringing back a totally worn-out backyard playset that has clearly spent years being torn up by their kids, or furniture that fell apart after years of use. The one thing that isn't really an abuse although it seems like it is when people bring back dead plants from their landscaping, because failure for the plant to take root and grow is considered a valid reason for return.

62449694
Jugaaad

62449716
>>62449441
>>62449623
Brown scammers like you need to go back to POOdia.

62449769
>>62449716
Make me

62449770
i would take my old furniture to costco for no other purpose than creating a physical obstacle for boomers trying to shop

62449829
>>62449441
Bloody brown bitch yes

62449846
>>62449769

62449850
>>62449770
But you dont. Why? are you lazy or a coward or just a blowhard incel?

62449862
>>62449388
Izzat status?

62449895
>>62449850
I'm a lazy coward blowhard incel but at least I'm making decent money from my investments.

62450126
>>62449846

62450247
SAAAAAAARS

62450251
>>62449388

>Return when price gone up.
>Free money

62450253
>>62449388
Wtf is wrong with indians?

62450259
>>62450251
?
You would get the same money that you paid when you bought it you fucking mongoloid.

62450296
>>62450251

62450328
>>62449441
Go back, Sukdeep

62450386
>>62450253
Why did you let them take over?

62450507
>>62449388
Just slit his throat if you're the customer behind. This is a fixable problem

62450508
>>62449716
>Poodia
It's called Fecalia, anon

62450519
>>62450507
>COSTCO Anonymous
White incels demanding someone else do their man work

62450613
>>62450251
Leave it to the goyim to exchange literal gold for literal paper and think they're getting one up on you.

62450617
>>62450613
Only morons think gold us a good investment

62450619
>>62449388
stock prices have nothing to do with how profitable a company is

62450628
>>62450251
Brown poojeet IQ in display. Receipts exist.

62451091
>>62450617
good goy

62451501
>>62451091

item.title: Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/? — 57 replies — 66.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/?

Open thread • Replies: 57 • Updated: 2026-07-06 15:44 UTC

OP

Any active duty US military members or veterans on /biz/?

I joined the military and I wanna know how to get a million dollars. I put 10% of my income into my retirement account and the rest of my free cash into index funds.

Early replies (first 3)

62447635
>>62447595
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sZZaOR4UCnE

62447641
>>62447595
The only smart play is to aim for a 100% disability rating which you can get in ~1 to 4 years (1 enlistment).
I know several guys getting $4000+ a month for life.
I am a vet and I get nothing.

62447664
>>62447595
If you're not high rank or close to information in some other way then it's just another job. Not gonna change much in terms of how getting a million would look like, you'll have to gamble like the rest of us.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62448503
>>62448491
Another white incel who knows everything, why you dont use your superpower to get rich is a mystery

62448525
>>62448503
>>62448482
Why don't you go recruit your fellow circumcised niggers, we could all do without them lmao

62448554
>>62448525
Mental illness

62448558
>>62448554
Lol disabled keyboard warrior downy

62448572
>>62447635
>>62447740

If any of you actually served you would know how anti-Israel the military is.

62448579
>>62448572
Which military, the iranian military

As for the US just keep sucking those circumcised peckers, they own you, bitch all you want about it

62448581
>>62447641
> I know several guys getting $4000+ a month for life
What a waste of $4000 going to the lower classes.

62448588
>>62448251
Just reply to them once. No need to point out why they glow. Dumb ass.

62448608
>>62447962
>>62448482
>>62448503
>>62448554
OCPD-poster detected. Go praise the jews elsewhere.

62448679
Last drone video about why doing war in the drone age is utter shit. https://i.4cdn.org/k/1783172321354125.webm

62448903
>>62448588
I just want it to stop. None of them care that this shit is extra inauthentic and borderline schizoid.

62448986
>>62448469
>>62448452
And this shit too
Some 29yo bitch talking about how young men should be sent to a meat grinder while her husband is 65.

Literally boomers trying to kill zoomers so they can fuck their daughters.

62449000
>>62447724
>promote it
You're the one promoting the idea of invading iran for real, genius, I'm telling you if you think it's "a better idea' then you can go hang out with the glowcrew.

62449029
>>62448022
Navy is a good way to save but realistically Coast Guard is probably nicer. Have a plan on saving $50k in 3yrs without deployment then put it in a fund and watch it grow

>>62448254
If they're going to be gay retards sure, but something harder to prove like mental health is easier.
VAC gets denied because you need consistent med appts when you're in otherwise you get nothing

62449133
>>62448581
The military is a welfare system for the power classes.

62449315
>>62447961
This is so true it's not even funny. I also can't emphasize enough how many retards BURN MONEY on new cars while laughing at me for driving an 07 shitbox.
I have never seen so many $50-80k cars in my life, trucks, SUVs and even a brand new Tesla. After a bit of time in you'll n/o/tice

62449322
>>62447595
the only way for the military members to make money is to go rob other country and sell drugs nigger
thats what the ships are for nigger

62449330
>>62447595
Unironically document your injuries, apply for appropriate disability before getting out

then start applying for fed jobs immediately. Use your college money. Hire on with the government. In time you might try government contracting, it pays a lot more than waging. But even fed wagies are often millionaires. Buy a house, that helps. If you work for the government they'll help you buy a house and then sell it if you move.

62449744
>Let the goyim deal in the real world

62450947
>>62448572
>reddit spacing
>post written by a zogbot with an israeli flag within 100ft at all times
>erm actually the heckin military hates its sole mission of fighting wars for israel

62451074
>>62447697
Israel/US jews did 9/11.
>t. two deployment Army veteran

62451135
>>62448022
They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once. Which is virtually everyone. The only way to get what is owed now is to apply for disability. When everyone who got out in the last 20 years is telling you to do it, you do that. Do not trust anyone in active service about this!

I wish I saved the shifty eyed army recruiter Wojack.

62451175
>>62451074
>two deployment Army Veteran
at least you admit you're a retard

62451198
>>62451135
Seriously do not trust them. Soldiers have a difficult adjustment to civilian life because they have to switch to from blind order following to street smarts where even their friends can back stab them. Soldiers who never adopt the either get killed with their deaths covered up. Sometimes soldiers just get killed for no reason.

62451215
>>62448579
>>62450947
youre so mindbroken lmao

62451282
>>62451215
You will never be a patriot

62451292
>>62447641
This. From everything I've heard and seen, aiming for disability is the way to go.

You will probably lose your dignity in the pursuit of this though, but the long-term benefits are probably worth it. They might be clamping down on this under Hegseth I imagine, but maybe it depends on your branch.

62451309
>>62447797
Its a good idea because you actually GET something not just numbers on a screen.
He might have $1 Million to pay down later but he has atleast 4 properties providing him passive income.
Not just income to pay down the mortgages, but actually passive income on top of that.
Landlording is extremely profitable and if you don't understand it you shouldn't get into it.
But you are fucking way the fuck up by not using the VA loan ever. It's an instant ticket to real estate. Buy with the intention to landlord and you will go far.
>>62451135
>>62451198
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once
You don't live in reality.
There are millions of vets recieving disability. The point of disability is so the government doesnt get sued. It's workman's comp.
If what you said was true then no one would recieve it.
You probably dont even know the types of discharges that qualify you for VA disability or P&T vs TDIU. You don't know none of the details of course.
You don't care because you just want to schizopost.

This is why you dont trust stupid old people on this site. They just think they know it all and get more stubborn and post borderline schizo shit.

62451317
>>62451292
VA is for every branch.
No one is taking away VA benefits the government would be sued.
Hegseth doesnt matter.
VA benefits = Workers comp
That is the entire point of it existing.

62451419
>>62451135
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once.
KEK. I just realized you know even less than I thought initially.
You do know the VA doesnt give disability until after you are out of the service, right?
How can they take away your bennies when you have an honorable discharge?
You probably don't even know what types of discharges there are yet you're saying this shit.
>>62451198
Is this what happened to your dad?
Failed to switch between blindly following orders and street smarts? And died?
>>62447896
>My family quit being a military family
>because of negations of benefits
>They negate all benefits if you show the slightest hesitation at following orders even once
What the fuck does this mean? Your dad was dishonorably discharged for disobeying orders? Just say that.
See this is why OP called you a schizophrenic incel.
I know Im replying way too much to these posts but this is not how reality works at all. Your view is not reality.

item.title: ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers — 10 replies — 40.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:35 UTC

OP

I literally did everything society told me to do. I survived four grueling years at State U. I made a LinkedIn. I have a bachelor's. I even bought one interview shirt. And THIS is how I'm repaid? AI took half the jobs, offshoring took the rest, every HR roastie recruiter ghosts me because they can somehow tell I'm not one of their corporate NPCs, and boomers bought five-bedroom houses with a summer job. Don't tell me to relocate. Don't tell me to commute. Don't tell me to get roommates. Don't tell me to buy a starter home. Don't tell me to lower my expectations. I was promised a six-figure remote job, unlimited PTO, and my dream house by 24. If I don't have all of that, then clearly the system is broken...not me. I am the victim here.

Early replies (first 3)

62451138
My female peers are all sucking and fucking big millennial cock

62451340
I'm single and I need a 3 bed 2 bath house so I can play video games and masturbate in peace.

62451425
Hurr durr boomers all got free houses, free virgins and free ubereats avocado toast thats why im a fat smelly incel

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451434
>>62451128
I don't get the obsession with zoomers.

62451447
>>62451128
I kinda miss when zoomers looked like this. It was very cute and endearing. Now zoomers look like haggard wraiths with how badly they're aging from all the stress, nicotine, and forever chemicals. Very sad generation, and I don't mean sad as in pathetic. Like genuinely sad. At least Millennials had a decent glimpse of the old world.

62451451
Hmm better get my hair curled into a big broccoli head

62451485
Things are so bad that I am rooting for this guy to kill some assholes and I am in my 40s. Lead head gens please get out of the way so we can fix things.

62451567
>>62451128
>>62451138
>>62451425
Holy seethe

62451617
>>62451128
which part of this is wrong though?

62451620
pic related is a 16 years old zoomer

u jelly?

item.title: A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn… — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:25 UTC

OP

A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking. Does that mean if I’ve staked 2000 LINK, I’d earn $2000 per day?
Is that true, or was the anon just talking bullshit?

Early replies (first 3)

62448322
>>62448316
Just bullshit. At 4% annually your link would need to be worth $9125 per token.

62448378
>>62448316
He is just talking bullshit. They just pushed all their users to pay through stripe. There is not really a pathway to imagine corporate successes translating into token holder value. Payment abstraction layer and staking were both a flop and they were what link holders always said would be the way they would make it but now instead they deleted the past marketing materials, disallowed comment on it in their AMA and pushed Stripe payments. It has unironically never been more obvious and is so obvious it is borderline in the exit phase

62448411
>>62448322
10k Link eoy

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62448505
I wish.

62448514
>>62448322
>>62448378
Kek why do fuddies always flag themselves as newfags by replying to pasta. Retarded fuddies. Just bought more LINK, seethe and dilate.

>posted from my iPhone from my beach house in Mexico

62448520
>>62448514
Not fudding - I bought another 1000 this week. What's your vision for where this is going?

62448521
>>62448316
if you follow the money there's a good reward waiting for those who stake

62450512
bump

62451573
>>62448520
I'm a cuckold and I just LOVE holding Chainlink. Whenever Sergey dumps millions of tokens on Binance I get super hard! Fuddies can cope and seethe but this is my fetish and you can't kink shame me

item.title: Why do people act like buying a house is a good investment >Property taxes >Maintenance >Repairs because something WILL… — 11 replies — 14.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why do people act like buying a house is a good investment >Property taxes >Maintenance >Repairs because something WILL…

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-07-06 15:50 UTC

OP

Why do people act like buying a house is a good investment
>Property taxes
>Maintenance
>Repairs because something WILL go wrong
>Even if you're "beating inflation" with a mortgage you're paying much more than its actual cost
>Closing costs
>All just so you can sell it (likely at a loss when considering inflation) so you can buy a slightly less expensive house
It's not that buying a house is a bad purchase if you can afford it, but acting like it's somehow an "investment" is absolutely retarded, you'd probably make more back from buying Pokemon cards

Early replies (first 3)

62450381
>>62450377
You're supposed to buy houses on a discount
>t. Selling for double what I purchased in 2023 after $20K in upgrades LOL

62450391
>>62450377
Idk I just want one to live in, but maybe they rent it that way person who rents pays bills and when he break something you can tell him to pay for it and then when they don't give a fuck anymore they sell it

62450397
>cbf moving every year because the landlord decides they a wankers and want to sell to some Chinese immigrants who took our jobs

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62450401
>>62450377

You really wanna know? For most people it’s because owning a house forces you to save via the mortgage payments. Yes, you could put that money into index funds instead or whatever and come out ahead, but normies wouldn’t do that, they’d spend it. For a single /biz/tard buying a house is probably not a good investment. But for most people, especially families, owning a house will improve their financial position over time because they will be forced to build equity over time instead of spending that money on stuff.

That’s why normies say housing is a “good investment”. For them it’s better than the likely alternative.

62450434
>>62450381
>double
you could've just bought MU, SNDK, etc.

62450436
It can work out cheaper than renting, depends on prices, now is probably a bad time to buy. No doubt all kinds of privilege taxes will be heaped on home owners too in the coming years, I think it's smarter to buy property outside of the west, the benefit also is that you can leave to live somewhere else at any time

62450445
Great, another rentoid cope thread

62450446
>>62450377
It’s hard to lose money from owning a house. What are the alternatives? Either rent where you get no money back, or if you’re lucky enough to live with parents who don’t ask for anything. Tax is a non issue. One year of tax is the equivalent of a renter paying one months rent. Maintenance is virtually cost free. Cleaning up the house is what any responsible human being does regardless of whether they own a house or not. Repairs happen anywhere. Learn to DIY. You shouldn’t need to spend $400 for someone to replace a $40 faucet that takes 30 minutes to do. It’s not only about investing from a financial point of view either. Owning a home is more piece of mind and being able to do whatever you want (not counting HOAs). That alone is worth it more than anything else

62450464
Renting when old will be a massive issue in years to come.
Pensions will not cover rent AND living for the vast majority of people.
It's an issue not reared its head yet because boomers own homes and have pensions that cover their living, or they are selling their homes for care.
Unless you know you are going to be wealthy, you need to own a home at some point or be utterly doomed to hardship in an already strained system in your old age.

>inb4 i'll just rope when old LULZ
Childish nonsense talk.

62451291
>>62450377
>Property taxes
>Maintenance
>Repairs because something WILL go wrong
all of this is wrapped up in your rent payment dumbass. you really think those costs don’t exist for your landlord and he’s not passing them on to you, plus profit?

62451450
buying a house cured my depression
best investment ever

item.title: Day 353 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $10 — 7 replies — 13.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 353 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $10

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-07-06 16:05 UTC

OP

Day 353 of snailposting every day until LINK is at $10

Early replies (first 3)

62448371
>>62447970
FIRST!!! LINK SNAIL CHUG A LUG A LUG. LINK SNAIL CHUG A LUG A LUG. TOOT TOOT. Lol Imagine if he was a steam engine with a pipe sticking out the back of him piping out coal black smoke and just looking back smiling like Steamboat Willie as he went along the track. Onward we go, LINK Marines! Make sure not to tell anyone about your boarding pass on the snail express otherwise otherwise they will be jealous, just show her your rolex and then give it to her and smile that type of confident smile only true wealth can give..She will know what you mean

62449022
>>62447970
i think you mean $1000

62449587
Why does it matter if link is at $1 or $1000? Nobody uses it anyway.
It's like the jewelry on the British crown fluctuating in value, who cares?
Do you own the crown? No? Then why does it matter?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62449749
>>62447970
Sergey won. Adem won. Cuckolds lost

62449839
>>62447970
Kek, it's over

62451482
>>62447970
I'm a proud cuckold and I love holding Chainlink. Whenever Sergey dumps 30 million tokens on Binance my little cock starts leaking pre cum :3

62451495
Yeah

62450941
>I told y'all you so.

62450957
>>62450903

62450960
ESL board confirmed.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62451162
>>62450941
>>62450957
>>62450960
WHEN I SAY “I TOLD”, YA’LL SAY “YOU SO!”

62451313
>>62451162
Okay... I'm waiting.
